full_text:
Hua Yi (Zhangjun)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hua Yi, styledZhangjun, was born in Gaotang. Avoided rank due to fears of nepotism then sacked for alleged corruption. Hua Yi was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
